## Merge checklist

- [ ] Small, intention-revealing commits
- [ ] No secrets, `.env`, `out/`, `tmp/`, logs, caches, or local databases
- [ ] `docs/current-state.md` updated if implementation status changed
- [ ] Requirement traceability/design decisions updated when applicable
- [ ] CI green and no known blocking issue
